title: bley's mounts
body:
# bley's mounts

A 1.21.11 fabric mod that tweaks mounts, mainly horses :)

Features:
- new horse markings
- overhauled horse mouvement to be more like real life horse riding
- horse swimming while riding
- merging fence gates
- using carpet in the armor slot for horse swag
- freely aim when holding a projectile or when in F5
- enhanced horse animations
- horse stick around their owner
- mounts can be ridden through leaves as to easily travel through forests
- Pressing the sprint key when on a mount triggers a capriole

Authors:
- [B.Ley](https://mastodon.art/@bley) -> Implementation and art assets
- [Vinaigrette [cKat]](https://www.youtube.com/@Vinaigrette_cKat_) -> [design](https://youtu.be/9jA1YdtHR4k?si=sJWXA7qwRKDlBOu3) and feedback

### Would you be able to make this a datapack / a neoforge mod / etc?

No, both from a technical ability sense and a time investement sense

### Can I use this in my modpack?

Absolutely, as long as proper credit is given, of course
